items.name: Subconscious Floating Aura
items.description:
Lost in the subconscious, drifting through the unknown... Are you even aware?

😵‍💫 Float subconsciously mid-air, unsure how you got here—waiting for someone to notice.

⚠️ Limited Edition! This emote won't last long—grab it before it's gone!

Perfect for:

Chill AFK poses 💤
Vibes and relaxing 🎶
Standing out in the crowd ✨
Cool idle moments 😎
Floating around effortlessly 🕊️
